title: ThaumPotion Tweaker
description: allows you to add custom potion recipes to the Thaumcraft crucible
body:
# 🧪 ThaumPotion Tweaker  

**ThaumPotion Tweaker** is a mod for Minecraft 1.12.2 that allows you to add custom potion recipes to the Thaumcraft crucible using a simple config file.  

---

## 🔧 Installation  

📦 Place `ThaumPotionTweaker.jar` into the `mods` folder.  
🚀 Launch the game — the file `ThaumPotionTweaker.cfg` will appear in the `config/` folder.  
📝 Open it and add your custom potion recipes.  

---

## ❓ FAQ  

**Q: Can I add this mod to my modpack?**  
**A:** ✅ Yes, you can!  

---
